name: aegis
description: A strict multi-agent swarm orchestration framework

scripts.build: npm run build:agora && npm run build:node
scripts.build:node: node --eval "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --project tsconfig.json
scripts.build:agora: node --eval "require('node:fs').rmSync('packages/agora/dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --project packages/agora/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build:agora && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project default
scripts.lint: npm run build:agora && tsc --project tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit && tsc --project packages/agora/tsconfig.json --noEmit
